query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean REGEXP '[IVXivx]+ [-–]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_inciso,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean REGEXP '§ [0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_paragrafo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean NOT REGEXP '^(Contribuinte deve|É vedado)' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as prefix_clean,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean LIKE '%?' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_interrogacao
FROM requirement_question_mapping;
command:

  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean REGEXP '[IVXivx]+ [-–]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_inciso,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean REGEXP '§ [0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_paragrafo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean NOT REGEXP '^(Contribuinte deve|É vedado)' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as prefix_clean,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean LIKE '%?' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_interrogacao
FROM requirement_question_mapping;
